My first ever bot,I ,I just made it in 5 hours so I just hope this will give normal answers,and I was make it on another account,but decide to make new acc for bots only.I tried to make it so that other gem can appear in plot,so use character book,im pretty sure @?Grim? made it,thanks a lot by the way, I think without this, this bot wouldn't work normally at all,Im really expressive about size of this lorebook,because I dont understand anything in it,but gonna try to make one myself
